issues.description: DSL is missing the core game mechanic. The card has an [Activate: Main] ability that requires: (1) resting this Stage, (2) checking if Leader's type includes 'CP', (3) reducing opponent's Character cost by 2 during this turn. Current DSL only contains PlaySelf trigger and Rest action with no condition or cost reduction effect.
PlaySelf trigger is incorrect for a Stage card with Activate ability. Should not auto-play on play.

Rest action exists but is disconnected from the actual activated ability logic. Missing: LeaderHasType condition ('CP'), PowerBoost action (−2 cost), target specification (opponent's Character, up to 1), and duration ('DuringYourTurn' since effect applies 'during this turn').
